1.notes: Next.js scaffold, required packages, PWA/image config, folder skeleton, and Supabase migrations are complete. GitHub origin pushed to AbdoDernawi/store main. 2.notes: Authentication & Role-Based Routing is implemented and verified locally and on production. Added Arabic light minimalist login/register pages, custom JWT cookie session, Supabase SSR clients, role middleware, initial dashboards for admin/marketer/delivery/customer, and Supabase Edge Function auth-password-v2 using Supabase Auth for password validation. Local lint/build passed; browser and HTTP checks verified redirects and role access. Vercel production at https://store-teal-six.vercel.app was deployed and checked for login, admin protection, and auth rejection behavior.

3a.notes: Inventory & Smart Warehouse API is complete. Added allocation, reserve, release, return-stock, transfer APIs and database functions. Verified in Supabase with a rollback transaction: order quantity 6 split across two warehouses by priority and created 2 reserved warehouse_movements.

3b.notes: Order Lifecycle API is complete. Added create, approve, reject, package create, QR scan, deliver, cash handover confirm, bank transfer confirm, and cancel APIs. Supabase rollback verification completed create→approve→QR→deliver→cash confirm with delivered final status, QR assignment true, and marketer wallet balance 30.00.
